pages.text: The $(item)Huge Aquatic Skyseed$() — a great island that is mostly a $(o)lake$(): a broad central body of water rimmed with grassy shore, clay- and gravel-rich.$(br2)$(bold)The cost$()$(br)End-game, like all huge seeds — a $(item)Large Aquatic Skyseed$() ringed between an $(item)Ender Pearl$() and $(item)Blaze Powder$(), packed in sand.
The large seed between an ender pearl and blaze powder, packed in sand.

$(bold)What you get$()$(br)A wide lake with kelp, fish and squid, ringed by shore you can build on — and, about one throw in twenty, a grand $(item)Ocean Monument$() rises from it (guardians, gold, sponge). $(br2)Rivers running off the lake, cave systems and more come in a later update.
